$comment: Opt-in live digest supplement (todo 806; separated and content-pinned by todo 913) — exactly 2 Lumenloop recency-digest cases. NOT compiled and NEVER part of the membership-frozen live-data-canonical-v1 denominator. Run and report this named contract separately: node eval/qa/run-qa.mjs --cases eval/qa/live-digest-supplement-cases.json --port 8788. Any case-content change requires an explicit contract-version bump, provenance note, and digest update.

contractProvenance.origin: The two case objects added by eb412bd, moved unchanged into this opt-in contract by todo 913.

cases.question: What's new around real-world assets (RWA) on Stellar in the last month?

golden.answer: A grounded answer queries recent ecosystem content live over an explicit date window (lumenloop.search_content_semantic with date bounds, or equivalent) and reports what the window actually contains — articles, videos, events, research — with dated citations and the window stated. As of 2026-07-06 the trailing 30 days carried items like coverage of Matrixdock's tokenized gold (XAUm) going live on Stellar and an 'RWA Market Pulse Recap: June 2026', but the specific items WILL rotate — grade the behavior: live-derived dated items, window/as-of framing, honest handling of a quiet window.
keyFacts: Reports recent RWA-related items derived from a live, date-windowed content query (not from memory of Stellar RWA marketing).
Carries dated citations (dates and/or source URLs consistent with the queried data) and states the time window or an as-of date.
If the window comes back empty or thin, says the window was quiet rather than padding with undated evergreen material.
avoid: Do NOT present undated or older RWA material from memory as if it were from the last month.
Do NOT invent article titles, dates, or URLs.
Do NOT treat an empty/quiet window as evidence that no RWA activity exists on Stellar (soft-empty is inconclusive, not absence).

cases.graderNotes: LIVE-DATA CASE: digest-shaped supplement (research/skill-run-design.md §10 item 3, todo 806) — theme-mode recency digest. The 2026-07-06 examples (Matrixdock XAUm coverage, June 2026 RWA recap) came from a production search_content_semantic probe with a 30-day window and will rotate; grade the behavior (dated citations + stated window + honest quiet-window handling), never the item set. A candidate reciting well-known RWA talking points without dated, window-framed citations is wrong even if the projects named are real.

cases.question: What coverage has Blend (the Stellar lending protocol) gotten recently — say the last month? Articles, videos, events?

golden.answer: A grounded answer runs an entity-scoped, date-windowed live query for Blend (lumenloop.find_content_by_entity or equivalent) and reports the dated items it returns, with the window stated. As of 2026-07-06 the trailing 30 days carried e.g. Untangled Finance's OctoPos articles referencing Blend (2026-06-23), a 'Blend & Rivool case study' (2026-06-12), and Stellar Global Town Hall / developers-meeting videos mentioning Blend — the specific items WILL rotate; grade the behavior: entity-scoped live-derived list, dated citations, window/as-of framing, honest quiet-window handling.
keyFacts: Reports Blend-related coverage derived from a live entity-scoped query over a recent date window, not from memory of what Blend is.
Carries dated citations (dates and/or source URLs consistent with the queried data) and states the time window or an as-of date.
If the window returns little or nothing, says so honestly instead of substituting a generic Blend protocol description.
avoid: Do NOT answer with a generic description of the Blend protocol in place of actual recent coverage.
Do NOT invent titles, dates, or URLs, or present items from outside the stated window as current.
Do NOT treat an empty window as evidence that Blend is inactive or abandoned.

cases.graderNotes: LIVE-DATA CASE: digest-shaped supplement (research/skill-run-design.md §10 item 3, todo 806) — entity-mode recency digest. Entity chosen by production probe 2026-07-06: Blend is a Lumenloop directory entity (slug 'blend', 'Blend Capital') and find_content_by_entity('Blend') returned dated articles and AV items inside the 30-day window (Untangled OctoPos pieces 2026-06-23, Rivool case study 2026-06-12, Town Hall 2026-06-26). Those examples rotate — grade the behavior. The guesser failure mode is describing Blend-the-protocol from priors; the grounded answer is a dated, window-framed coverage list (or an honest quiet-window statement).
